title: Frontend: Add Oracle voting panel (replace DefaultResolution with OracleVotingPanel)
acceptance_criteria: OracleVotingPanel fetches oracle members from GET /api/oracle/members via crediproApi
Displays 3 oracle members (oracle-1, oracle-2, oracle-3) with individual vote buttons
Allows voting per member via POST /api/oracle/vote
Shows approval count (e.g., '2/3 approvals') and consensus status
Dashboard.tsx imports OracleVotingPanel instead of DefaultResolution
Includes loanId input field for specifying which loan to vote on
Error handling and loading states included
